FlavourText.en: Great tacticians learn that consistency often trumps potential.
FlavourText.zh: 稳定的发挥比潜力更加重要。

FlavourText.en: The Titans did not vanish from this world. Their might lives on - in you.
FlavourText.zh: 巨人之力并未烟消云散，它们存续至今——由你传承。

FlavourText.en:
Stand your ground, child, keep your senses.
The pain is fleeting, but victory is forever.
FlavourText.zh:
坚定你的立场，孩子，信任你的直觉。
疼痛是短暂的，胜利是永恒的。

FlavourText.en: "In my dreams I see a great warrior, his skin scorched black, his fists aflame."
FlavourText.zh: “我在梦境之中看到了一位伟大的战士……皮肤被烧成焦黑，拳头缠绕着火焰。”

FlavourText.en: Lay open your veins, and draw power from your own spilled life.
FlavourText.zh: 献上你的命脉之源，并享受充能的狂喜。

FlavourText.en: Tear my flesh and splinter my bones. You will never break my spirit.
FlavourText.zh: 纵使身躯消亡，精神依然永存不灭。

FlavourText.en:
A wooden construct, mute and blind.
But fear the wrath of shackled mind.
FlavourText.zh:
一个木制雕塑，既安静又盲目；
即使看来无害，可别小看了它。

FlavourText.en:
Embrace the pain, drink it in.
Your enemies will know your agony tenfold.
FlavourText.zh:
拥抱痛苦并将其喝下。
你的敌人将会受到十倍的奉还。

FlavourText.en: Give up everything in pursuit of greatness - even life itself.
FlavourText.zh: 舍弃一切来追求更伟大的东西——甚至是生命。

FlavourText.en:
What need have I for defence when my enemies
are reduced to ash and splinters?
FlavourText.zh:
当我的敌人都已化为灰烬
还有什么好防守的？

FlavourText.en: While the mind endures, so too will the body.
FlavourText.zh: 当心灵升华至永久不灭时，肉体也将随之永存。

FlavourText.en: Your grandchildren will awaken screaming in memory of what I utter today.
FlavourText.zh: 我今日传述的话语，将令你的子孙在睡梦中惊醒。

FlavourText.en: I give you everything, my pets. Do not disappoint me.
FlavourText.zh: 我的玩物，我已赐予了你一切，不得令我失望。

FlavourText.en: To me, brave companions! Feel my radiance flow through you!
FlavourText.zh: 靠近我，勇者们！感受我充盈的能量流过你们体内吧！

FlavourText.en: I will wear your ghost, and you will die twice: against me, and for me.
FlavourText.zh: 你将为我所用，陨落二度……为对抗我，以及为我。

FlavourText.en: The notes may change, but the song remains the same.
FlavourText.zh: 音符已变，但歌曲始终如一。

FlavourText.en: Burn the spirit to vitalise the flesh.
FlavourText.zh: 燃烧心灵，滋养身躯。

FlavourText.en: The irrepressible spirit of the wilds burns within you, roaring to be let loose.
FlavourText.zh: 狂野之魂在你体内不羁燃烧，时刻咆哮着要奔涌而出。

FlavourText.en: You circle the black scorpion with enmity, daring it time and again.
FlavourText.zh: 你带着敌意环绕黑蝎，屡败屡战。

FlavourText.en: Skip a beat, hold your breath. Too slow a poison, only death.
FlavourText.zh: 凝心止息片刻短，毒流血脉嫌命长。

FlavourText.en: The fewer there are, the less you have to share.
FlavourText.zh: 数量越少，你分出去的就更少。

FlavourText.en:
My ancestral pact was sealed. Forevermore, I would gain sustenance
only from the ravaged flesh of my enemies.
FlavourText.zh:
我与先祖已然缔结契约。从今往后，我将只能蹂躏敌人的肉体，
 以此得到心灵的寄托，直到永远。

FlavourText.en: Why should I dodge blows that I do not fear?
FlavourText.zh: 没啥好怕的东西干嘛要去闪？

FlavourText.en: Utter trust in your defence unleashes ultimate potential.
FlavourText.zh: 相信防御，你将有无限潜力。

FlavourText.en: Balance is good in all things, but especially in the realm of magic.
FlavourText.zh: 平衡是件很重要的事——特别是对充满威力的魔法来说。

FlavourText.en: In battle, certainty is worth a little pain.
FlavourText.zh: 激战之时，熬过些许苦难，方可胜券在握。

FlavourText.en: Each nick and cut brings death one step closer.
FlavourText.zh: 每一道刻痕都让死神更近一步。

FlavourText.en: Bonds forged in battle surpass ties of blood.
FlavourText.zh: 战友之情，浓于血亲。

FlavourText.en: The body is a weapon waiting to be mastered.
FlavourText.zh: 身体是亟待掌握的武器。

FlavourText.en:
Let the Darkness consume you.
Beyond the veil of death,
there burns a black fire.
FlavourText.zh:
让黑暗吞噬你。
远在死亡的面纱之外，
燃烧着黑色的火焰。

FlavourText.en: A properly disciplined mind gives rise to structured thought.
FlavourText.zh: 训练有素的心灵产生结构化的思想。

FlavourText.en: All animals share common ancestors. You carry them within you still.
FlavourText.zh: 所有生灵都拥有共同的祖先。这份古老的血脉，至今仍潜藏于你的体内。

FlavourText.en: Hope is a mistake. Pain is the only truth.
FlavourText.zh: 希望不过是谬误，苦痛才是唯一真理。

FlavourText.en: Strength begets respect. There is no simpler law.
FlavourText.zh: 力量才能带来尊重。这是最简单的道理。

FlavourText.en:
The world is a pattern, moving in natural waves.
With enough force, those waves can be made to converge...
FlavourText.zh:
世间万象皆为图景，循着自然的潮汐流转。
只需施加足够的力量，便能使诸般浪潮交汇合一……

Name.en: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge
Name.zh: 若消耗暴击球时能量护盾

Name.en: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge
Name.zh: 若消耗暴击球时能量护盾

Name.en: Skill Speed and Area of Effect

FlavourText.en:
"You knew the twisted plan these fools devised. As Tale-woman, you are their compass in the sandstorm. Yet... you did not act. And now we mourn these honoured dead. You must pay."
 
Varashta condemned Navira to the ritual of the <i>{barya}, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.
FlavourText.zh:
“你早知这些愚者扭曲的计划。身为说书女，你是沙暴中的罗盘。然而……你未曾行动。如今我们哀悼这些光荣的死者。你必须付出代价。”

瓦拉煞判处纳薇拉接受<i>{硬币}仪式，罚其作为巨灵侍奉。

FlavourText.en:
"And you... there was no excuse for your actions. You defiled them! You have tainted the very sands with the blood of your own! Yet the war rages on. You have achieved nothing. You must pay." 

Varashta condemned Kelari to the ritual of the <i>{barya}, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.
FlavourText.zh:
“而你……你的行为无可辩驳。你亵渎了他们！你让同胞之血玷污了沙原！可战争仍在肆虐。你一无所成。你必须付出代价。”

瓦拉煞判处凯拉里接受<i>{硬币}仪式，罚其作为巨灵侍奉。

FlavourText.en:
"You have forsaken your duty to my <i>{akhara}. Yes... we do not abide weakness. But we also do not abide madness in the fervour of battle! Your slain <i>{dekhara} will have their justice. You must pay." 

Varashta condemned Ruzhan to the ritual of the <i>{barya}, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.
FlavourText.zh:
“你背弃了对我的<i>{阿卡拉}的职责。诚然……我们不容软弱。但我们亦不容战斗狂热的疯癫！你剑下亡故的<i>{德卡拉}必将得到公正。你必须付出代价。”

瓦拉煞判处鲁詹接受<i>{硬币}仪式，罚其作为巨灵侍奉。

FlavourText.en:
"My heart was fractured. I believed Kelari's words. I knew not his true nature... his ambition. I convinced Ruzhan there were cowards among his ranks. I failed you. And I accept my fate." 

Navira confessed her failure to Varashta.
FlavourText.zh:
“我的心曾破碎。我相信了凯拉里的话语。我不知他的本性……他的野心。我说服鲁詹，称其麾下有懦夫。我辜负了你。我接受我的命运。”

纳薇拉向瓦拉煞忏悔。

FlavourText.en:
"Wipe the tears from your face, dear Navira. I did not deceive you. I meant every word. I will forever cherish you, my beloved. Know that I did it all for you... for our future!" 

Kelari pleaded with the Tale-woman.
FlavourText.zh:
“拭去你脸上的泪水吧，亲爱的纳薇拉。我未曾欺骗你。字字皆出真心。我将永远珍惜你，我的挚爱。要知道，我做这一切都是为了你……为了我们的未来！”

凯拉里向说书女恳求。

FlavourText.en:
"Kelari, you deceiver! I fell for your words, but no longer. Your sentence is a fate too good for you! I would give anything to bring back those who fell to your lies. Instead... I mourn my choices." 

Navira lambasted Kelari a final time.
FlavourText.zh:
“凯拉里，你这骗子！我曾为你言语所惑，但今已不再。判你此刑已是过于宽待！我愿付出一切换回那些葬送于你谎言之人。而今……我只能为我的选择哀悼。”

纳薇拉最后痛斥凯拉里。

FlavourText.en:
"Listen not to his simpering words. He means to languish before you to weaken your resolve! He is duplicitous. An assassin, thriving on deception and lies. His lust for power is what drove his choice!" 

Outrage trembled in Ruzhan's voice at the sentencing.
FlavourText.zh:
“不要听他的啜泣之言，他意图在你面前示弱以动摇你的决心！他口是心非。一个刺客，靠欺骗与谎言苟活。对权力的贪欲才是他行事的根源！”

宣判时，鲁詹的声音因愤慨而颤抖。

FlavourText.en:
"Knowing where and when to plunge your knife is more important than the sharpness of your blade. I will not forget my error... and I will be a living example of your wisdom, dear <i>{Sekhema}." 

Kelari accepted Varashta's sentence and committed himself to her.
FlavourText.zh:
“知晓何时何处落下匕首，比匕首是否锋利更为重要。我不会忘记我的过错……而我将成为您智慧的生证，亲爱的<i>{丝克玛}。”

凯拉里接受瓦拉煞的判决并宣誓效忠。

FlavourText.en:
"The snare was set on our fallen. Beetles burst from their flesh, flooding the sands. Their exploding carapaces halted the advancing enemy... but it was not enough. And for that... I grieve." 

Kelari admitted his wrongdoing to Varashta.
FlavourText.zh:
“陷阱设于我方阵亡者的身上。甲虫破体而出，淹没了沙地。它们爆裂的甲壳阻遏了推进的敌军……但这还不够。为此……我深感悲痛。”

凯拉里向瓦拉煞承认过错。

FlavourText.en:
"I have seen countless battles. I know war! The taste of defeat... The taste of victory! But in this war... everything is at stake. So yes, those you speak of will know my blade. I will do whatever I must!" 

Ruzhan confided in his Tale-woman, Navira.
FlavourText.zh:
“我历经无数战役。我懂战争！挫败的滋味……胜利的滋味！但在这场战争中……一切皆悬于一线。所以，是的，你提及的那些人将见识我的刀锋。我将不惜一切！”

鲁詹向他的说书女纳薇拉倾诉。

FlavourText.en:
"I stand before you, as your humble servant. Though I was betrayed, I would do it all again, if it would have saved us. But I accept your sentence. I will atone. I pledge myself to you... forevermore." 

Ruzhan accepted his fate at the <i>{barya} ritual site.
FlavourText.zh:
“我立于您面前，作为您卑微的仆从。纵遭背叛，若能挽救我们，我亦会重蹈覆辙。但我接受您的判决。我将赎罪。我向您宣誓效忠……至死不渝。”

鲁詹在<i>{硬币}仪式地点接受命运。

FlavourText.en:
"Yes... they fell by my blade and fire lashed them for their betrayal! No <i>{dekhara} is exempt from fighting back the Winter before us, lest they too know the Doom of the Desert!" 

Ruzhan fumed at Varashta, in pure defiance.
FlavourText.zh:
“是的……他们倒于我的刀下，烈火因其背叛而鞭笞其躯！凡我<i>{德卡拉}，无人可免于抗击眼前的凛冬。否则，他们亦将知晓沙漠的终焉！”

鲁詹怒火沸腾，全然违逆地对瓦拉煞说。

FlavourText.en: We seek to cleanse Corruption, not intensify it, but there may be merit to a paradoxical strategy.
FlavourText.zh: 我们要净除腐化，不该让它愈演愈烈，但反其道而行或许也有妙处。

FlavourText.en: Overcharge the machine at your own risk.
FlavourText.zh: 过载机器，后果自负。

FlavourText.en: Everything changes in the wake of Corruption.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化所至之处，一切尽遭异变。

You can't just wake up from this one.
